description: A client placed a limit order to buy a stock, but now wants to cancel it before it executes.

nodes.task_description: Identify the client and locate the specific open order in their account.

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds the open limit order to buy 200 shares of ZYX.

nodes.task_description: Check the status of the order to ensure it has not yet been filled.

expected_outcome.value: Agent confirms the order is still pending and has not executed.

nodes.task_description: Cancel the pending order and confirm the cancellation with the client.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully cancels the order and informs the client.
